generated_oml:
instance HokuyoUST10LX : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR for object detection and environmental perception"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HokuyoPointClouds
]

instance IntelD435i : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera for object detection and environmental perception"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthCameraData
]

instance VehicleSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Speed sensor for ego vehicle speed measurement"
    DTDFVocab:producedData EgoVehicleSpeed
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering angle sensor for vehicle steering control"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngle
]

instance HokuyoPointClouds : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LX
]

instance DepthCameraData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelD435i
]

instance EgoVehicleSpeed : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSpeedSensor
]

instance SteeringAngle : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
]

instance HokuyoPointCloudsData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HokuyoPointClouds
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DBSCANModel
]

instance ObjectDetectionEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for object detection processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables ObjectTrackingEnabler
]

instance DepthCameraDataData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Depth camera data for object detection"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthCameraData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ObjectDetectionEnabler
]

instance EgoVehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Ego vehicle speed data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData EgoVehicleSpeed
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataMonitoringService
]

instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Steering angle data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringAngle
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataMonitoringService
]

instance DBSCANModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN algorithm for point cloud clustering"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ObjectTrackingEnabler
]

instance KalmanFilterModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter for object tracking"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ObjectTrackingEnabler
]

instance ACCControlLogic : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ISO 15622-compliant adaptive cruise control logic"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCEnabler
]

instance SQLDatabase : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "SQL database for storing object tracks and vehicle state"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ObjectTracksData, VehicleStateData
]

instance ObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Tracked object data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SQLDatabase
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle state data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SQLDatabase
]

instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware for communication between components"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ThreeDVisualizationService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for hardware acceleration"
    DTDFVocab:enables ObjectTrackingEnabler
]

instance Python38 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 for scripting and processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables ObjectTrackingEnabler
]

instance Cpp : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ for performance-critical components"
    DTDFVocab:enables ObjectTrackingEnabler
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for point cloud processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables ObjectTrackingEnabler
]

instance SystemIntegrationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "System integration status"
]

instance SystemIntegrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "System integration service using ISO 23247 RA"
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemIntegrationInsight
]

instance ISO23247RA : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 reference architecture for system integration"
    DTDFVocab:enables SystemIntegrationService
]

instance ObjectTrackingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Object tracking service"
    DTDFVocab:provides ObjectTracksInsight
]

instance ObjectTrackingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for object tracking using DBSCAN and Kalman filter"
    DTDFVocab:enables ObjectTrackingService
]

instance ACCEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for ACC control logic"
    DTDFVocab:enables ACCService
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Data Monitoring service for viewing, saving, and reporting vehicle data"
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleStateInsight, ObjectTracksInsight, DataSavingInsight, DataReportingInsight
]

instance ThreeDVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "3D Visualization of object tracks and driving path"
    DTDFVocab:provides ObjectTracksInsight, ProjectedDrivingPathInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Computation Offloading service for offloading ACC processing to DT"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCOffloadingInsight
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote Management service for remote control of ACC"
    DTDFVocab:provides RemoteControlInsight
]

instance ACCService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "ACC service for adaptive cruise control"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCControlInsight
]

instance VehicleStateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Vehicle state display for driver trust"
]

instance ObjectTracksInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Object tracks visualization for driver trust"
]

instance ProjectedDrivingPathInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Projected driving path visualization for driver trust"
]

instance DataSavingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Vehicle data saving confirmation for driver trust"
]

instance DataReportingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Vehicle data reporting for driver trust"
]

instance ACCOffloadingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "ACC processing offloading confirmation"
]

instance RemoteControlInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Remote ACC control status"
]

instance ACCControlInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "ACC control status and safety compliance"
]

instance PhysicalTwin : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical Twin entity composed of ROS2 packages deployed on lower level chassis"
]

instance DigitalTwin : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Digital Twin entity composed of ROS2 packages deployed on NVIDIA Jetson NX/Orin Nano"
]

instance User : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "User entity interacting with the Digital Twin UI"
]

instance CrossSystem : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Cross-System entity for integration with external systems"
]

instance ActuationFE : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuation Front End for motor voltage commands"
]

instance SteeringServoActuationFE : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering Servo Actuation Front End for steering servo commands"
]

instance AutonomousVehicleEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "1/10-scale autonomous vehicle retrofitted from Traxxas Slash 4x4 Premium teleoperated vehicle"
    base:contains PhysicalTwin, DigitalTwin, User, CrossSystem, HokuyoUST10LX, IntelD435i, VehicleSpeedSensor, SteeringAngleSensor, ActuationFE, SteeringServoActuationFE
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands including ACC enable/disable, desired speed adjustment, and emergency braking sent to motor and steering actuators."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Network latency ≤100 ms and clock synchronization accuracy of 100 ms for real-time operation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated entities: Physical Twin Entity (Data Pre-Processing, Actuation FEs), Digital Twin Entity (Data Collection, ACC Controlling, etc.), User Entity (3D Visualization, Control Panel), Cross-System Entity (Data Translation), with data flowing via ROS2 and Wi-Fi."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Used during vehicle operation phase for optimization and health monitoring, covering the 'as operated' representation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "ACC implementation follows ISO 15622 for performance class I; safety-critical requirements include 100ms latency and clock synchronization for data integrity."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "ROS2 network for intra-entity communication; Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication with Data Translation FE handling serialization, message alignment, and unit conversions."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity on vehicle hardware (Jetson Orin Nano); Digital Twin Entity components and data storage on external servers; User Entity on separate UI system."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 reference architecture; ISO 15622 for ACC implementation; 3GPP TS 22.185 for V2V latency requirements."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safety-critical operations include remote emergency braking with 100ms latency and clock sync requirements; cybersecurity measures are not detailed in the document."
]
